name: bn-issuetracker-chrome
description: BitNinja IssueTracker for Chrome/Edge is an extension for Google Chrome and Microsoft Edge Chromium that helps the BitNinja Support team to add issues to the IssueTracker system easier and faster (half-automated).

scripts.zip:dist: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path dist.zip) { Remove-Item dist.zip -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path dist\* -DestinationPath dist.zip -Force"
scripts.package:dist: npm run build:dist && npm run zip:dist
scripts.package:release: npm run build:dist && npm run zip:dist && npm run pack:crx

author: Marcell Csendes <BitNinja>
